sections.text: Fine-tuning Qwen3-Embedding-4B on our internal ticket corpus improved retrieval P@10 by 3.2 points. sections.text: SOC 2 auditor flagged that our secret rotation for AWS IAM keys is quarterly, not monthly. A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Credit notes issued via the dashboard are not syncing back to QuickBooks. The customer portal is letting users cancel subscriptions mid-term without refund logic. EU VAT calculation is off by the rounding rule — we round per-line, Stripe rounds per-invoice.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Password reset tokens are not being invalidated after a successful reset — they remain valid for 15 minutes. JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.

The new RBAC role for the oncall group needs get,list,watch on pods and logs across all namespaces. CronJob for nightly ETL is overlapping because concurrencyPolicy was left at the default Allow.

sections.text: MMLU scores for our rerank model, measured on CS subset, dropped after the last checkpoint merge. Cost per 1M tokens for text-embedding-3-large is $0.13; fine-tuning Qwen is $0.007 per 1M. 18x cheaper. Red-team findings: 3 prompt-injection patterns that bypass our system prompt. Mitigations in review.

sections.text: Vault token TTL is 30d but the auto-renew cron only runs weekly — tokens expire mid-week sometimes. SOC 2 auditor flagged that our secret rotation for AWS IAM keys is quarterly, not monthly. Supply-chain: a dependency of one of our dependencies was typosquatted. Lockfile review this Friday.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: NetworkPolicy default-deny was applied to the staging namespace and broke the egress to the DB. Pod affinity rule is too strict — we want soft-anti-affinity across zones, currently set to hard.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Chaos day: we want to kill 30% of replicas in staging and see if the SLO holds. The 2026-04-17 incident: BGP flap at the edge took us down for 9 minutes. Postmortem draft attached.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Next.js 15 App Router migration: the /settings page is still using the Pages Router data fetching. Hydration mismatch warning on the dashboard — server renders timestamp in UTC, client in local. React Query cache invalidation after org switch isn't clearing the /api/projects query.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Usage-based metering events are being counted twice on retry when the initial request times out. Invoice PDF generation times out for customers with > 500 line items — need to paginate.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Invoice PDF generation times out for customers with > 500 line items — need to paginate. Failed payment retry cadence needs to match Dunning best practices: day 1, 3, 5, 7, then cancel. Stripe webhook for customer.subscription.trial_will_end is not being dispatched to our handler.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Pen test found an IDOR in the /api/users/:id endpoint — we're checking auth but not scope. SBOM generation for the release pipeline needs to include Rust crates, not just Go + npm. A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Alembic downgrade path for migration 0038 is broken — it references a column that was renamed in 0041. Foreign key cascade on org_memberships is deleting audit entries — the constraint should be RESTRICT.

sections.text: OKR: 'RAG search is used by 60% of paying orgs weekly' — currently at 34%. NPS dropped 3 points this quarter; top complaint is ingestion latency on Confluence.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Accessibility audit: 14 color-contrast failures on the dark theme, mostly in secondary text. Hydration mismatch warning on the dashboard — server renders timestamp in UTC, client in local.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Tailwind's new v4 engine changed how arbitrary values are parsed; our design tokens broke. Playwright test for the invite flow is flaky — the email input doesn't receive focus reliably on webkit. Core Web Vitals: LCP is 4.2s on the pricing page because the hero image is eagerly loaded.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Prometheus query for p99 latency returns NaN when the service has < 30 requests in the window. PagerDuty integration is missing the severity field on alerts coming from Alertmanager.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: WebAuthn passkey enrollment fails on Safari 17 when the user has multiple resident credentials registered. OIDC discovery URL returns 502 from behind the load balancer; the health check path is wrong.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Failed payment retry cadence needs to match Dunning best practices: day 1, 3, 5, 7, then cancel. The customer portal is letting users cancel subscriptions mid-term without refund logic.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: SOC 2 Type II audit window is July 1 through June 30; Vanta is our automation platform. Master Services Agreement redline with enterprise customer: they want data-residency guarantees in EU.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Contract review SLA: 5 business days for standard, 10 for redlined. Vendor risk assessment for new SaaS tools: security, privacy, cost, contract review.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Privacy policy needs updating to reflect the new sub-processor for rerank (SiliconFlow). Trademark filing for the Hiveloop name in the EU is in examiner review, 6 months expected.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Credit notes issued via the dashboard are not syncing back to QuickBooks. EU VAT calculation is off by the rounding rule — we round per-line, Stripe rounds per-invoice.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Embedding drift: after the model update, existing chunks no longer match new queries well. The reranker is returning identical scores for candidates with very different content — the model is clipping. GitHub private repo docs are leaking into public search because the access_type wasn't set at ingest.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: SOC 2 auditor flagged that our secret rotation for AWS IAM keys is quarterly, not monthly. Our SSO IdP is Okta, and the metadata URL rotated without notice. All logins failed for 8 minutes.
sections.title: Message

sections.text: Stock option plan: 4000 shares reserved for Q2 hires, 2500 remaining after current offers. Bank account for the UK entity is open; move GBP-denominated customers to it by July.
sections.title: Message
